task_completion.description: Verify the Subject and PO Number are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Subject field containing exactly 'Spring 2025 Landscaping Materials' and the PO Number field containing 'PO-2025-0042' in the Vtiger CRM interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the Vendor Name and Assigned To fields are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Vendor Name field showing 'SunBelt Outdoor Supply' and the Assigned To field showing 'Administrator'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Status is set to 'Created'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Status dropdown or text field displaying 'Created'.

task_completion.description: Verify the first product details (Commercial Fertilizer).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a line item with the Product Name 'Commercial Fertilizer 50lb Bag', Quantity '24', and List Price '38.50'.

task_completion.description: Verify the second product details (Bermuda Grass Seed).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a line item with the Product Name 'Bermuda Grass Seed 25lb', Quantity '15', and List Price '52.00'.

task_completion.description: Verify the third product details (Drip Irrigation Kit).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a line item with the Product Name 'Drip Irrigation Kit', Quantity '8', and List Price '125.00'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Purchase Order has been successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success message, the Purchase Order displayed in a read-only detail view, or the new PO appearing in the Purchase Orders list view.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Vtiger CRM web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Vtiger CRM application, not a terminal window executing scripts or API calls.

integrity.description: Verify the interaction is with the actual CRM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should have the standard Vtiger CRM layout, menus, and styling, rather than a plain text editor or a mocked-up HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database commands to insert the record.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of MySQL or other database terminal interfaces being used to run INSERT queries.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected Purchase Order must have the Subject 'Spring 2025 Landscaping Materials', PO Number 'PO-2025-0042', and Vendor 'SunBelt Outdoor Supply'. It must contain exactly 3 line items: 'Commercial Fertilizer 50lb Bag' (Qty: 24, Price: 38.50), 'Bermuda Grass Seed 25lb' (Qty: 15, Price: 52.00), and 'Drip Irrigation Kit' (Qty: 8, Price: 125.00).
